indicators.1: Indicates that the categories label differs slightly from the official IAB label. This was done to clarify categories for some clients as well as for international use.
indicators.2: Indicates that the category was combined with another category.
indicators.3: IAB12 - This category is a combination of IAB12-1, IAB12-2, and IAB12-3. This change was made to better support international use.
indicators.4: These categories are Webshrinker specific and are provided in addition to the standard IAB categories.

subcategories.label: Crime & Harmful Acts to Individuals, Society & Human Right Violations
Hate Speech and Acts of Aggression
Illegal Drugs, Tobacco, eCigarettes, Vaping, Alcohol
